family_members.description: Stores individual family members, ancestral nodes, and their genealogical relationships.

fields.id: string - Unique identifier of the family member
fields.userId: string - The owner of the record (Firebase UID)
fields.name: string - The encrypted or plaintext name
fields.birthplace: string - Plaintext or encrypted city/country of birth
fields.parents: array of strings - IDs of father/mother in the database
fields.siblings: array of strings - IDs of siblings
fields.children: array of strings - IDs of children
fields.isAncestor: boolean - True if this is an ancestor rather than direct family
fields.photos: array of strings - Optional URLs or base64 image strings attached

fields.title: string
fields.fileData: string - base64 string or image link

lineage_requests.description: Stores access requests and restriction criteria between users for family member records.

fields.id: string - Unique identifier of the request
fields.fromUserId: string - UID of user requesting access
fields.fromUserEmail: string - Email or identifier of the requester
fields.toUserId: string - UID of user owning the record
fields.memberId: string - The ID of the family member record
fields.memberName: string - The name or relation of the member

contact_messages.description: Stores submitted secure contact and support queries with integrated anti-spam metadata.

fields.id: string - Unique identifier of the message
fields.name: string - Full name of the sender
fields.email: string - Sender's verified secure email address
fields.subject: string - Subject topic of the query
fields.message: string - Main text of the request

user_subscriptions.description: Stores user premium upgrade status, active subscription details, and transaction histories.

fields.isPremium: boolean - True if upgraded to unlimited member plan
fields.razorpayOrderId: string - Latest Razorpay Order ID created
fields.razorpaySignature: string - Razorpay verified secure signature hash
fields.expiresAt: string - Expiry timestamp of the current subscription

donations.description: Stores elective support contributions made by users.

system_settings.description: System-wide settings managed by the Super Admin.

fields.supportFlowEnabled: boolean - Toggle if donation tab is visible
fields.upgradeFlowEnabled: boolean - Toggle if upgrade plan flow is active
fields.maxMembersIfUpgradeEnabled: number - Max member count slot limit if upgraded
